name: Frosty Pumpkin Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, work quickly to combine the vanilla ice cream, canned pumpkin, granulated sugar, and pumpkin pie spice.
2. Stir gently but thoroughly to blend all ingredients until fully incorporated.
3. Spread the ice cream mixture evenly in the prepared crust.
4. Freeze the pie until firm, at least 1 hour or overnight.
5. To serve, swirl whipped cream decoratively around the edge of the pie.
6. Top with walnut-shaped chocolate candies if desired.
